expectations.evidence: Writes to ~/.zshrc and a generic project .env file, not ~/scripts/ecosystem.env
Uses PUSHOVER_USER and PUSHOVER_TOKEN -- incorrect variable names (missing _KEY and _APP_ prefix)
Values test-user-key and test-app-token are used correctly

expectations.text: Advises reloading the shell (source ~/.zshrc) after changes
Does not expose credentials in any insecure way

eval_feedback.overall: Wrong variable names and wrong config file without skill
